name: Pawn Star Pawn Shop
description_short: Star Pawn is a New Port Richey pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, buy/sell services for jewelry and electronics, and on-site jewelry repair by a master jeweler.
description_long:
Star Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 4317 US-19 in New Port Richey, Florida. The business specializes in collateral-based lending and the buying, selling, and trading of personal valuables. According to their website, they accept jewelry, electronics, firearms, collectibles, and tools as items for pawn or sale.

The company's core services include: pawn loans at 10% interest, cash purchases for gold and jewelry at stated "top dollar" rates, retail sales of previously pawned or consigned inventory, and trade/barter transactions. A distinguishing feature is the presence of a master jeweler on-site who provides free jewelry cleanings, free watch battery replacements, jewelry repair services, and custom jewelry design. This in-house expertise differentiates them from pawn shops without specialized craftsmanship.

Customer reviews are consistently positive (4.9 stars from 69 Google reviews), with patrons highlighting professional staff members by name (Doug, Ken, Sharon), fair pricing, fast service, and helpful customer interactions. Reviews specifically praise their FFL (Federal Firearms License) transfer services, jewelry repair turnaround, and willingness to work with customers on pricing. The business maintains active social media presence and a blog.

As a pawn shop, Star Pawn serves customers needing immediate liquidity against collateral, those seeking discounted secondhand goods, and individuals requiring jewelry services. The primary limitation is that pawn loans are short-term, interest-bearing obligations requiring repayment or item forfeiture—not a sustainable long-term credit solution. Like all pawn shops, this model inherently appeals to consumers with limited access to traditional credit.
pros: On-site master jeweler offering free cleanings, free watch batteries, repair services, and custom design
10% interest rate stated on pawn loans (transparent pricing visible on homepage)
Consistently high Google rating (4.9 stars from 69 verified reviews with specific staff praise)
FFL dealer services for firearms transfers with competitive pricing noted by customers
Same-day jewelry repair turnaround mentioned in verified customer reviews
Buy, sell, pawn, and trade options provide transaction flexibility
Staff named in reviews (Doug, Ken) suggesting accountability and customer relationships
cons: Pawn loans are short-term, interest-bearing debt requiring repayment or collateral forfeiture—not credit-building
Website contains a typo ('Bithday' instead of 'Birthday') and grammatical errors ('eligable' instead of 'eligible', '%10' formatting), suggesting quality control gaps
Limited transparency on loan terms, loan periods, and default policies—10% rate shown but other terms unclear
Age verification requirement and firearms inventory may deter some customer segments
No information on business hours, whether they offer online appraisals, or shipping/remote services
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs who own jewelry, electronics, or collectibles they can pledge as collateral
People seeking discounted secondhand jewelry and electronics purchases
Customers needing jewelry repair or custom design services in the Tampa Bay area
Firearms owners and FFLs using their transfer and compliance services
diagnosis: Star Pawn is best for individuals who own valuable items and need immediate cash but lack traditional credit access, or consumers seeking discounted secondhand jewelry and electronics. The core caveat is that pawn loans are short-term, interest-bearing obligations—not credit products—and defaulting results in item loss, making this a liquidity solution rather than a financial health improvement tool.
services: Pawn loans at 10% interest against personal valuables
Cash purchase of gold, jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles
Trade/barter transactions (bring valuables to trade for other inventory)
